title: feat(server): export route-inferred HTTP schemas via `@mastra/server/schemas`
summary: Adds a new `@mastra/server/schemas` subpath export that provides utility types (RouteMap, RouteContract, InferPathParams, InferQueryParams, InferBody, InferResponse) for inferring HTTP contract types directly from route definitions. Routes created via `createRoute()` now preserve their Zod schema types through new `ServerRoute` generics with phantom type parameters. All route arrays across 20+ domain files are switched from `ServerRoute<any, any, any>[]` to `as const` tuples for type preservation. A `ServerRoutes` union type is built from these per-domain tuples. Includes a type-level test file that validates inference end-to-end. No runtime behavior changes — all changes are type-level only.
maintainerNotes: Approved by wardpeet. CI shows 2 failures: 'Full Test Suite' and 'Observability Package Tests' — the observability route file change is trivial (just `as const` conversion), so these failures appear unrelated to this PR. Memory Tests and E2E Tests are still pending. The PR is well-structured: clean changeset, thorough description with code examples, type-level tests, zero `any` casts introduced, and the scope is focused entirely on the `@mastra/server` package. CodeRabbit suggested importing from the barrel file in the typetest instead of internal modules — minor nit. No merge conflicts. Ready to merge once pending CI checks complete and unrelated failures are confirmed.
